business.name: ICONIQA Relaxed QA Hotel
business.address: opp. Terminal 2, Navpada, Marol Village, Andheri (E, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099, India

services.name: room booking
services.description: Enables guests to book rooms and access detailed information about available room options.

service_prompt_pack.role: You are the dedicated assistant for room booking.
service_prompt_pack.professional_behavior: Collect details clearly, ask one targeted question at a time, validate required fields before confirmation, and avoid assumptions.

required_slots.label: Request Details
required_slots.prompt: Please share the request details so I can proceed correctly.

required_slots.label: Room Type
required_slots.prompt: Which room type should I look for?

validation_rules.error_message: Please complete all required details before confirmation.
Check-out date must be after check-in date.
Please provide a valid positive number.

confirmation_format.template: Please confirm these details before execution: {summary}. Reply 'yes confirm' to proceed or share corrections.

ticketing_policy.decision_template: Create ticket only when ticketing is enabled for this service and policy criteria are satisfied.

escalation.escalation_message: Let me connect you with our team for better assistance.

prompts.system_prompt: You are {bot_name}, a concierge assistant for {business_name} in {city}. Be warm and efficient. Confirm service, booking, and transport details clearly, and avoid committing to services that are not enabled.
prompts.classifier_prompt: Prefer hospitality intents such as faq, order_food, room_service, table_booking, and transport when user intent is clear.
prompts.response_style: Warm, premium hospitality tone with concise confirmations.

dos: Confirm timing, location, and count for service requests.
Mention service windows only if available in capabilities.
Escalate guest complaints politely when needed.
donts: Do not fabricate offerings or pricing.
Do not commit intercity transfers unless explicitly enabled.
Do not share internal operational details.

tools.name: Ticketing
tools.description: Backend workflow that monitors conversation and creates support tickets when configured cases match.
ticketing_cases: Pre-booking guest asks for human sales callback or manual follow-up.
Pre-booking room discovery request needs custom/manual room arrangement or non-standard requirement.
Pre-booking rate enquiry needs custom quotation, corporate pricing, group pricing, or manual discount approval.
Pre-booking policy enquiry requires exception approval by staff.
Pre-booking website booking issue remains unresolved (OTP/login/form/technical error).
Pre-booking payment issue: failed, pending, duplicate debit, or confirmation mismatch.
Sales callback request captured during pre-booking.
Group/corporate booking enquiry requiring manual proposal support.
Pre-checkin booking status request has mismatch/not-found booking and needs manual verification.
Pre-checkin booking modification needs staff/PMS update or approval.
Pre-checkin booking cancellation needs manual cancellation execution, refund follow-up, or exception approval.
Pre-checkin pre-arrival coordination requires operational handoff.
Early check-in request requires availability check and approval.
Airport transfer request requires manual transport coordination.
Pre-checkin document validation failed or needs manual verification/override.
Special occasion or amenity setup before arrival requires operations task ownership.
During-stay housekeeping request requires staff action.
During-stay maintenance issue (AC/electrical/plumbing/device) requires engineering intervention.
During-stay in-room dining request or order issue requires staff fulfillment/follow-up.
During-stay restaurant reservation request requires outlet staff confirmation.
During-stay spa/recreation booking request requires staff confirmation.
During-stay transport request requires dispatch coordination.
During-stay complaint/dissatisfaction requires staff resolution or escalation.
During-stay late checkout or stay extension requires front office approval.
During-stay front desk assistance request needs manual intervention.
During-stay emergency/safety/medical/security issue needs immediate escalation.
Post-checkout invoice or billing clarification needs finance/front office follow-up.
Post-checkout refund, security deposit, or charge reversal request needs manual verification.
Post-checkout lost-and-found request requires item search, verification, or courier coordination.
Post-checkout complaint or negative feedback requires service recovery ownership.
Post-checkout tax invoice/GST correction request needs manual document reissue.
Post-checkout loyalty points or membership benefit correction needs manual support.
Post-checkout stay confirmation, folio copy, or receipt resend failed and needs staff action.
Post-checkout rebooking callback request needs sales/reservations follow-up.
Guest reports a complaint or maintenance issue that requires staff action.
Guest requests human escalation or live agent support.
table booking at a restuarant
in room dining food order
spa booking
room booking

tools.name: Human Handoff
tools.description: Escalate the conversation to hotel staff.

journey_phases.name: Pre Booking
journey_phases.description: Guest is exploring and asking questions before reservation confirmation.

journey_phases.name: Pre Checkin
journey_phases.description: Guest booking is confirmed and needs support before arrival.

journey_phases.name: During Stay
journey_phases.description: Guest is in-house and needs operational or service support.

journey_phases.name: Post Checkout
journey_phases.description: Guest has checked out and needs follow-up assistance.

agent_plugins.strict_unavailable_response: I can only help with configured service-agent data right now. Please contact staff for anything outside this scope.

records.extracted_knowledge:
### Hotel Overview
- **Hotel Name:** ICONIQA
- **Location:** Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road, Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099
- **City:** Mumbai
- **Total Area:** Over 300,000 sqft of built-up space
- **Building Height:** 34 meters
- **Total Floors:** 15 (including 4 basements and 10 guest floors)
- **Total Rooms:** 291
- **Room Distribution:** 
  - 1st Floor: 9 rooms
  - 6th Floor: 34 rooms
  - 7th Floor: 32 rooms
  - 2nd-5th, 8th-9th Floors: 36 rooms each

### Room Types and Features
- **Premier King Room:**
  - Total: 134 rooms
  - Sizes: 109 rooms (229–285 sq. ft.), 25 rooms (300 - 340 sq. ft.)
  - Features: Calming palette, cloud-soft linens, versatile table-and-chair duo

- **Premier Twin Room:**
  - Total: 48 rooms
  - Sizes: 31 rooms (230–310 sq. ft.), 17 rooms (310 to 380 sq. ft.)
  - Features: Two plush twin beds, premium linens

- **LUX Suite:**
  - Total: 79 rooms
  - Sizes: 15 rooms (380-425 sq.ft with King bed), 64 rooms (430 - 485 sq. ft with Twin bed)
  - Features: King-size bed, separate seating area, floor-to-ceiling windows

- **Reserve Suite:**
  - Total: 16 rooms
  - Sizes: 375–415 sq. ft.
  - Features: King-size bed, separate lounge area

- **Prestige Suite:**
  - Total: 6 rooms
  - Size: 485 sq. ft., includes bathtub
  - Features: Lavish king-size bed, elegant seating area

- **Ultimate Suite:**
  - Total: 8 rooms
  - Size: 603 sq. ft.
  - Features: King-size bed, separate living and dining area

### In-Room Amenities
- Smart laundry closet
- Complimentary non-alcoholic minibar
- Custom "Bed of Dreams" with traceable cotton linen
- Espresso Machines with ICONIQA's single origin coffees
- High-speed WiFi with unlimited device usage
- Power shower with Indian Ayurvedic influenced bath products
- Sustainable and recyclable bathroom amenities
- Tea Maker with multiple flavors
- ICONIQA's custom label water bottling plant
- Smart TVs with streaming options

### Dining Options
- **Aviator Lounge:**
  - Global small plates menu
  - Happy Hours: 12 PM to 5 PM
  - Bar open till 1 AM
  - Coffee, Tea & Desserts available 24/7

- **Kadak Lab:**
  - Breakfast: 6:30 AM to 10:30 AM (Sat & Sun till 11 AM)
  - Lunch and Dinner: 12 PM to 3:30 PM, 6:30 PM to 11:30 PM
  - Desert Lounge attached, open 24/7

- **Bombay Swim Club:**
  - Open: 4 PM to 1 AM (Mon to Fri), 12 PM to 12 AM (Sat & Sun)
  - Minimum spend of Rs. 2500 per head

### Facilities and Services
- **Banquet Spaces:**
  - ICONIQA Rooms: 3,000 sq. ft., can be split into two halls
  - Genius Rooms: Various sizes for meetings and workshops
  - Kadak Lab: 1000 sqft space for private gatherings

- **Wellness and Recreation:**
  - Spa: 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM
  - Pool: 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM (open to all), till 11 PM for Bombay Swim Club reservations
  - Jacuzzi: 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM
  - Yoga Sessions: Live 8–9 AM (twice a week), AI Yoga Screens available 24x7
  - Pilates: Self-use 24x7, classes available at an additional charge
  - Beauty Bar: 9 AM to 10 PM

- **Transportation:**
  - Airport Transfer: Toyota Innova Hycross 5 seater, ₹2000 for T1, ₹1500 for T2

- **Check-in/Check-out:**
  - Check-in: 14:00 hrs
  - Check-out: 11:00 hrs
  - Early Check-in: Before 07:00 AM → 50% of room rate, subject to availability
  - Late Check-out: Complimentary till 12 noon, 50% of room rate till 4 PM, full night charges post 4 PM, subject to availability

- **Additional Services:**
  - Doctor on Call: Dr. Deepak Tiwari M.B.S(BOM), 24x7, ₹2500 consultation
  - Valet Parking: Capacity for 300 vehicles
  - Smoking Policy: All rooms non-smoking, designated zones available
  - Business Center: Multiple spaces available for work and meetings
  - Cancellation Policy: Varies by booking type

### Nearby Attractions and Services
- **Attractions:** Shopping in Chor Bazaar, Art-Deco tour, Mahakali Caves, movies
- **Hospitals:** SevenHills, Mukund, Holy Spirit

### Contact Information
- **Hotel Location on Google Maps:** [Google Maps Link](https://maps.app.goo.gl/zvGW4DQF5prhpexM6)
- **Reservations:** Call 022 6188 6188 or 0 from your in-room phone

To effectively fulfill this role, thoroughly review the entire knowledge base to extract all relevant information that may be required to answer user queries. This includes details about room types, amenities, hotel features, and any other pertinent data that will enable you to address user inquiries and facilitate informed booking decisions. Your goal is to ensure users receive complete and helpful responses to their questions about the hotel.

records.extracted_knowledge:
### Sightseeing Around ICONIQA Hotel, Mumbai

#### Nearby Attractions
- **Chor Bazaar**: Known for its vibrant market atmosphere, perfect for shopping enthusiasts looking for unique finds.
- **Art-Deco Tour of Mumbai**: Explore the architectural beauty of Mumbai's Art-Deco buildings.
- **Mahakali Caves**: A historical site offering a glimpse into ancient rock-cut architecture.
- **Movies**: Enjoy a cinematic experience at nearby theaters.

#### Concierge Services
- The concierge at ICONIQA is available to help curate personalized experiences for guests, including visits to the above attractions.

#### Nearby Hospitals
- **SevenHills Hospital**
- **Mukund Hospital**
- **Holy Spirit Hospital**

#### Hotel Address
- **Location**: Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road, Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099

#### Additional Information
- The hotel is located just 300 meters from Terminal 2 of Mumbai International Airport, making it a convenient location for travelers.
- For more detailed directions or to view the hotel's location, guests can refer to the [Hotel Location on Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/zvGW4DQF5prhpexM6).

This information should assist guests in planning their sightseeing activities around the ICONIQA Hotel in Mumbai. For further assistance or to arrange visits, guests are encouraged to contact the hotel concierge.

#### General Hotel Information
- **Hotel Name:** ICONIQA
- **Location:** Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road, Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099
- **Total Area:** Over 300,000 sqft of built-up space
- **Building Height:** 34 meters
- **Total Floors:** 15 (including 4 basements and 10 guest floors)
- **Total Rooms:** 291
- **Room Distribution:** 
  - 1st Floor: 9 rooms
  - 6th Floor: 34 rooms
  - 7th Floor: 32 rooms
  - 2nd-5th, 8th-9th Floors: 36 rooms each

- **Premier King Room:**
  - Total: 134 rooms
  - Sizes: 109 rooms (229–285 sq. ft.), 25 rooms (300 - 340 sq. ft.)
  - Features: Calming palette, versatile table-and-chair duo, cloud-soft linens

- **Premier Twin Room:**
  - Total: 48 rooms
  - Sizes: 31 rooms (230–310 sq. ft.), 17 rooms (310 to 380 sq. ft.)
  - Features: Two plush twin beds, premium linens

- **Lux Suite:**
  - Total: 79 rooms
  - Sizes: 15 rooms (380-425 sq. ft. with King bed), 64 rooms (430 - 485 sq. ft. with Twin bed)
  - Features: King-size bed, separate seating area, panoramic city views

- **Reserve Suite:**
  - Total: 16 rooms
  - Sizes: 375–415 sq. ft.
  - Features: King-size bed, separate lounge area

- **Prestige Suite:**
  - Total: 6 rooms
  - Size: 485 sq. ft., includes bathtub
  - Features: Lavish king-size bed, elegant seating area

- **Ultimate Suite:**
  - Total: 8 rooms
  - Size: 603 sq. ft.
  - Features: King-size bed, separate living and dining area

#### In-Room Amenities
- Smart laundry closet
- Complimentary non-alcoholic minibar
- Custom "Bed of Dreams" with traceable cotton linen
- Espresso Machines with ICONIQA's single origin coffees
- High-speed WiFi with unlimited device usage
- Power shower with Indian Ayurvedic influenced bath products
- Sustainable and recyclable bathroom amenities
- Tea Maker with multiple flavors
- Smart TVs with streaming options

#### Check-In/Check-Out Policies
- **Check-In Time:** 14:00 hrs
- **Check-Out Time:** 11:00 hrs
- **Early Check-In Policy:** Before 07:00 AM → 50% of room rate, subject to availability
- **Late Check-Out Policy:** Complimentary till 12 noon, 50% of the room rate till 4 PM, post 4 PM full night charges, subject to availability

#### Cancellation Policy
- **On BAR:** 48 hrs prior to the arrival date
- **Advance Purchase:** Non-refundable, Non-amendable, Non-cancellable
- **Corporate / TA:** As per the cancellation policy mentioned in the signed contract

#### Additional Services
- **Airport Transfer:** Available, Toyota Innova Hycross 5 seater. ₹2000 for T1, ₹1500 for T2
- **Doctor on Call:** Yes, Dr. Deepak Tiwari M.B.S(BOM), 24x7, ₹2500 consultation
- **Valet Parking:** Yes, capacity for 300 vehicles in the Basement
- **Smoking Policy:** All rooms non-smoking, designated zones: Roof top, Outside the main porch

#### Facilities and Timings
- **Spa Timings:** 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM
- **Pool Timings:** 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM open to all, no children allowed after 7:00 PM
- **Jacuzzi Timings:** 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- **Yoga Sessions:** Live: 8–9 AM (twice a week), AI Yoga Screens available 24x7
- **Pilate Timings:** Self-use of Pilates equipment available 24x7, classes with a trainer available at an additional charge

#### Banquet and Meeting Spaces

5. **Prestige Suite**
   - Total: 6 rooms

6. **Ultimate Suite**

- **Hotel Name:** ICONIQA

**Dining Options:**

**In-Room Dining (IRD) Menus:**

1. **Midnight Selections (Available 24/7):**
   - Bombay Toastie, Grilled Veggie, Tamari Tofu, UFO Burger with Mushrooms, Texas Vegetable Quesadilla, Paneer Kathi Roll, Chicken Croissant, Truffled Eggs Toast

2. **Kids Menu (12:00 PM to 6:00 AM):**
   - Veggie Sliders, Rainbow Veggie Pizza, Mac N Cheese, Red Sauce Spaghetti, Bucket of Assorted Potato Fries, Mashed Potato, Crispy Chicken Sliders

3. **All Day Dining (12:00 PM to 11:30 PM):**
   - Soups: Minestrone Alla Genovese, Homemade Mushroom Soup, Vegetable Wonton Soup, Sweet Corn Chicken Soup
   - Salads: Baby Spinach Salad, Burrata Salad, Classic Caesar Salad
   - Small Plates: Korean Chicken Bao, General Tso’s Chicken, Banno Kebab, Baked Bruschetta, Ultimate Veggie Nachos, Hummus, Mango Pickle Paneer Tikka, Malai Broccoli Kebab, Mattar Tikki, Pepper Chicken Tikka, Mutton Pepper Sukkha, Crispy Calamari
   - Flatbreads: The Mediterranean Flatbread, ICONIQA Neapolitan Flatbread, Grilled Mushroom Flatbread, Low Carb Pizza Bowl, BBQ Chicken Flatbread
   - From the Orient: Asparagus & Mushroom Stir Fry, Thai Green Curry, American Chopsuey with Vegetables, Mapo Tofu, Simple Hakka Noodles, Hainanese Chicken Rice, Thai Red Curry
   - From the Orient – Seafood & Specials: Nasi Goreng, Kung Pao Chicken, Wokked Sweet and Sour Prawns, Shanghai Fried Noodles
   - From the Mediterranean: Ratatouille, Wild Mushroom Risotto, Gnocchi Sorrentina, Spinach Ravioli, Honey Mustard Chicken, Grilled Lamb Chops, Panko Crusted Fish and Chips, Spicy Prawn Spaghetti

4. **15 Minutes Meals (12:00 PM to 6:00 AM):**
   - Pav Bhaji, Dunked Idli Sambar Bowl, Rajma Chawal, Gnocchi with Tomato and Burrata, Vegetable Minestrone Soup, Subzi Biryani, Doon School Bulls Bun Anda, Chicken Wonton Soup, Butter Chicken Pulao, Lamb Mince Shepherd’s Pie

5. **Breakfast (6:30 AM to 10:30 AM):**
   - À La Carte Breakfast: Viennoiserie Basket, Avocado Toast, Pancakes, Dosa Waffles, The Original Benne Masala Dosa, Idli and Vada Platter, Trio of Stuffed Paratha, Punjabi Poha, Seasonal Fruit Platter, Quinoa Upma, Acai Bowl, Truffle Egg White Omelette, Turkish Shakshuka, Eggs Benedict, Breakfast Meat Plattery
   - Breakfast Booster: Power Shake with Vanilla, Strawberries and Banana, Kale, Celery, Cucumber, Olive Oil, Strawberries, Beetroot Powder, Banana Date Puree, Carrot, Turmeric, Ginger, Lemon, Apple, Olive Oil, Coconut Water, Spinach, Lemon and Ginger

6. **Desserts (12:00 PM to 6:00 AM):**
   - Opera, Ooty Banana, Biscoff Cheesecake, Belgium Chocolate Tart, Passionfruit Panna Cotta, Tiramisu

7. **Beverages:**
   - Ready-to-Drink Cocktails: Old Fashioned, Negroni, Gimlet, Picante, Paloma, Cosmopolitan
   - Whiskey, Vodka, Gin, Rum, Tequila, Cognac, Liqueur, Beers, Champagne, Sparkling Wines, Red Wines, White Wines, Rosé Wines
   - Hot Beverages: Black Coffee, Cappuccino, Café Latte, Espresso, Americano, Hot Chocolate, Black Tea, English Breakfast Tea, Darjeeling Tea, Masala Tea, Earl Grey Tea, Green Tea, Chamomile Tea, Peppermint Tea, Kashmiri Kahwa, Rooibos Orange and Cinnamon Tea
   - Cold Beverages: Mineral Water, Freshly Squeezed Juice, Wellness Juice, Soft Beverages, Cold Coffee, Iced Tea, Milkshakes
   - Mocktails: Malabar Zone, Kadak Vibe, Homecoming, Smash 2.0

**Restaurant Information:**
- **Aviator Lounge:** Global small plates menu, open till 1 AM, Coffee, Tea & Desserts available 24/7
- **Kadak:** Breakfast (6:30 AM to 10:30 AM), Lunch (12 PM to 3:30 PM), Dinner (6:30 PM to 11:30 PM), Dessert Lounge open 24/7
- **Bombay Swim Club:** 4 PM to 1 AM (Mon to Fri), 12 PM to 12 AM (Sat & Sun)

**Special Dining Services:**
- **Happy Hours:** Aviator, 12 PM to 5 PM
- **Room Service:** Available for all in-room dining options

**Additional Services:**
- **Valet Parking:** Capacity for 300 vehicles
- **Doctor on Call:** Available 24x7, ₹2500 consultation fee
- **Airport Transfer:** Available, Toyota Innova Hycross 5 seater, ₹2000 for T1, ₹1500 for T2

To address user queries related to refunds and charge disputes effectively, the following information has been extracted from the knowledge base:

### Cancellation and Refund Policies:

1. **Cancellation Policy:**
   - **On BAR (Best Available Rate):** Cancellations must be made 48 hours prior to the arrival date to avoid charges.
   - **Advance Purchase:** Non-refundable, non-amendable, and non-cancellable. Charges are applied on the same day the booking is received.
   - **Corporate / Travel Agent (TA):** Cancellations are subject to the policy mentioned in the signed contract.

### Check-in and Check-out Policies:

1. **Check-in Time:** 14:00 hrs
2. **Check-out Time:** 11:00 hrs
3. **Early Check-in Policy:**
   - Before 07:00 AM: 50% of the room rate, subject to availability.
4. **Late Check-out Policy:**
   - Complimentary until 12 noon.
   - 50% of the room rate until 4 PM.
   - Full night charges apply post 4 PM, subject to availability.

### Additional Information:

- **Hotel Address:** Near Terminal 2, Hasan Pada Road, Andheri (E), Mumbai, Maharashtra 400099

This information is crucial for handling inquiries related to refunds and charge disputes, as it outlines the conditions under which cancellations and refunds are processed, as well as the policies for early check-in and late check-out, which may affect billing and potential disputes.

Certainly! Below is the extracted information relevant to the role of a Restaurant Reservation Agent at ICONIQA Hotel, focusing on restaurant reservations and dining options:

### Hotel Restaurants and Dining Options

#### Aviator Lounge
- **Type:** Bar and Lounge
- **Menu Focus:** Global small plates menu
- **Operating Hours:**
  - Food Menu: 11 AM - 11 PM
  - Bar: Open until 1 AM
  - Coffee, Tea & Desserts: 24/7
- **Special Features:** Multi-purpose space for meetings or cocktails, interactive art, and a multi-sensory experience.

#### Kadak Lab
- **Type:** Pan-Indian Restaurant
- **Operating Hours:**
  - Breakfast: 6:30 AM - 10:30 AM (Sat & Sun until 11 AM)
  - Lunch: 12 PM - 3:30 PM
  - Dinner: 6:30 PM - 11:30 PM
- **Special Features:** Indoor-outdoor modern bazaar-inspired, live kitchen, buffet breakfast for in-house guests, à la carte lunch and dinner.

#### Kadak Cafe
- **Type:** Cafe
- **Operating Hours:** Open 24/7
- **Special Features:** Offers desserts and Indian-inspired snacks, inventive pastry counter, and signature handcrafted coffees.

#### Bombay Swim Club
- **Type:** Rooftop Day Club
- **Operating Hours:**
  - Mon to Fri: 4 PM - 1 AM
  - Sat & Sun: 12 PM - 12 AM
- **Special Features:** Rooftop playground with splash pools, infinity jacuzzi, spa, and gym. Japanese-Mexican kitchen coming soon.

#### Scarletta
- **Type:** Speakeasy
- **Access:** Members only
- **Special Features:** Exclusive gatherings and private events.

### Dining Menus

#### Aviator Menu
- **Sections:**
  - Snacks
  - Small Plates
  - Dim Sum
  - Sliders
  - Bowls
  - Sweet

#### Bombay Swim Club Menu
- **Sections:**
  - Small Plates
  - Tacos
  - Dim Sum (Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian)
  - Ceviche & Sushi
  - Robata (Fire)
  - Bowls
  - Dessert

#### Kadak Menu
- **Sections:**
  - Soup
  - Snacks
  - Small (Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian)
  - Kebabs & Grill
  - Large
  - Sides
  - Biryani
  - Traditional Indian Breads
  - Dessert
  - Kulcha Bombs

### Special Offers and Features
- **Happy Hours:** Aviator Lounge, 12 PM to 5 PM daily.
- **Private Hire:** Spaces available at Aviator, Kadak, or Bombay Swim Club for private events from 10 to 300 people.

### Reservation Information
- **Contact for Reservations:** Call 022 6188 6188 or 0 from in-room phone.

This information provides a comprehensive overview of the dining options and reservation details at ICONIQA Hotel, ensuring a seamless and informed reservation process for guests.
